1.title: Ascendant (body comfort)
1.shubha: A good strong body, beautiful form, well-proportioned physique.
1.paapa: A weak body, a body prone to ailments, a body that is out of proportion is obtained.
1.neutral: Middle class health, beauty, fit body.

2.title: Second position (Dhana position)
2.meaning: Family Reciprocity, Speech Purification, Money Movement, Eyes.
2.shubha: There will be family comfort, good speech, eye comfort, wealth.
2.paapa: There will be family quarrels, eyesight problems, harshness in speech and financial losses.
2.neutral: Money and family happiness are common.

3.title: Tertiya Sthana (Bhatru Sthana)
3.meaning: Minimal fraternity, courage, close travels, ears, initiative nature.
3.shubha: There will be cooperation, courage and success of siblings.
3.paapa: There will be conflict, fear, defeats and vocal problems with siblings.

4.title: Chaturtha Sthana ( Matru Sthana )
4.meaning: House, vehicle, household goods, immovable property, relation with relatives, servile people.
4.shubha: Maternal comfort, own house, vehicle yoga, immovable property will be there.
4.paapa: Illness or opposition to mother, loss of household vehicle, lack of happiness.
4.neutral: Household and vehicular comforts are basic.

5.title: Panchama sthana (son's place)
5.meaning: Vidya Grahak Shakti, Path Director, Counselor, Minister, Sat Santhanam, Home Village.
5.shubha: Good children, ministership, wisdom, humility, erudition, proficiency in scriptures.
5.paapa: Does not confer virtue, but does not do evil because there is no sin. The results are simple.

6.title: Sixth Sense (Shatrusthana)
6.meaning: Enemies, debts, diseases, suspicions, insults, slanders.
6.shubha: There will be no enemy, debt or disease problems. Money will come from usury business or medical profession.
6.paapa: Enemy, debt and disease problems can harass you throughout your life. There will be troubles, slanders and debts.

7.title: Seventh Sense ( Kalatra Sthana )
7.meaning: Partnership, food, recreation, sleep, marriage, controlled living.
7.shubha: Happiness from art, attractive wife/husband, money and other happiness will be obtained in time.
7.paapa: There will be no comfort of wife/husband, marital problems, lack of peace of mind. If 8th house dosha is suicidal impulse.

8.title: Ashtama Bhava (Ayusthana)
8.meaning: Life, wins and losses, court cases, contingencies.
8.shubha: There will be long life, healthy body, strong semen and comfort. There is no fear of premature death.
8.paapa: There will be short life, premature death, imprisonment and misfortunes. Lack of libido.

9.title: Ninth Place (Paternal Place)
9.meaning: Good relationship with father, filial piety, pilgrimages, piety, good deeds, pious deeds.
9.shubha: Father's property will be obtained, all riches, lasting wealth, fortune and godliness will be obtained.
9.paapa: There will be destitution, extreme poverty, lack of piety and loss of property.

10.title: Decimal Place (Life Place)
10.shubha: High profession, political positions, fame and respect, Ashtabhogas. A sober life.
10.paapa: Constant struggle for life, lack of respect and difficulties in career.

11.title: Ekadasa Sthana (Labha Sthana)
11.meaning: Elder brothers and sisters, revenue, ill-gotten gains, robberies.
11.shubha: Income in various forms, lottery profits, dowry, huge financial gains.
11.paapa: There will be disruptions in income, losses in profits, loss of father's property and addictions.

12.title: Dwadasha Sthana (Vaya Sthana)
12.meaning: Expenditure, Moksha place, Urdhvalokas, Divine devotion, Sunayasa death or bad death.
12.shubha: Expenditure for good deeds, spiritual contemplation, happiness at the time of death, access to heaven.
12.paapa: Orphaned death without relatives, abusive expenses, desperate death.
